scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n build,serve -c blue,green "vite build --watch" "wrangler pages dev dist --d1=webapp-production --local --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 3000"
scripts.dev:sandbox: taskkill /IM workerd.exe /F 2>NUL & wrangler pages dev dist --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.dev:d1: powershell -Command "Get-Process workerd -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force" & wrangler pages dev dist --local --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name webapp
scripts.db:seed: wrangler d1 execute webapp-production --local --file=./seed_users.sql && wrangler d1 execute webapp-production --local --file=./seed_data.sql
scripts.db:reset: taskkill /F /IM workerd.exe 2>NUL & powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if(Test-Path .wrangler/state/v3/d1){Remove-Item .wrangler/state/v3/d1 -Recurse -Force}" && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed
scripts.git:init: git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial commit'
scripts.dev:local: npm run build && npm run dev:d1
scripts.db:seed:all: npm run db:seed && npx wrangler d1 execute webapp-production --local --file=./seed_hr.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute webapp-production --local --file=./seed_inventory.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute webapp-production --local --file=./seed_production.sql
scripts.db:reset:full: npm run db:reset && npm run db:seed:all
